desc: a top-level `const box` that shares its name with a `ref="box"` must not collide with the emitter-injected ref member: Lit promotes the user binding to `this.box` (ref stays the prefixed `_refBox`), Angular renames the ref field/selector/#template-ref to `boxRef` (user `box` field intact) — no duplicate class member, no wrong `this.box()` signal read
